title: astragalus angustus var. longifolius
intro: Astragalus angustus var. longifolius, also known as the narrow-leafed milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus angustus var. longifolius include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for various health conditions such as fatigue, respiratory issues, and cardiovascular disease. Astragalus angustus var. longifolius can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
